rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER SECOND AMENDED AND RESTATED, HAROLD E. KORF TRUST, DECEASED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustees Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of The Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Kyong M. Kim
rulings.Rulings: The Court, having granted Ricardo Alvarez's prior counsel's motion to withdraw on February 19, 2014, continues the hearing on the motion to strike to March 12, 2014. Ricardo Alvarez is ordered to file an opposition to the motion to strike no later than March 5, 2014. Alternatively, he and any newly retained counsel may file a motion to continue the March 12, 2014 hearing upon showing of good cause.
